name: CrewPlan

pricing_tiers.notes: Full HRIS, GDPR automation, SSO included
Adds capacity planning, skills matrix, succession planning

features: automated GDPR right-to-erasure with self-service portal and compliance certificate (72hr SLA)
continuous performance feedback with 360-degree review cycles
eNPS and pulse survey tooling (configurable cadence)
onboarding workflow templates (25 consulting-specific templates included)
learning management system (LMS) with CPD tracking
InsightDeck native connector for headcount analytics
known_limitations: PayAxis integration via certified connector (not native API) — Meridian's specific connector version untested
UK payroll sync requires connector configuration by CrewPlan implementation team (2-3 day lead time)
No built-in payroll engine — payroll must remain in PayAxis or equivalent
Workforce tier required for capacity planning and skills matrix
notes: At 150 seats, Core tier = £360/mo vs PeoplePulse £385/mo = £25/mo saving (£300/yr). Migration at 12hrs × £48 = £576, amortised £192/yr. Net = £108/yr — well below £1,200 threshold on direct saving alone. Operational gains: GDPR automation removes HIGH compliance risk, continuous feedback resolves PeoplePulse's most-flagged issue, eNPS and LMS fill current gaps. PayAxis connector risk is a concern — not native. PeoplePulse contract ends Nov 2025. Strong HOLD candidate — switch case is compelling operationally but economics and contract timing argue for reassessing at renewal.
